CustomField.description: Formula: CPU time consumed by this operation (ms).
CustomField.formula: IF( AND(NOT(ISBLANK(LimitsCpuTimeAtEnd__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(LimitsCpuTimeAtStart__c))), LimitsCpuTimeAtEnd__c - LimitsCpuTimeAtStart__c, NULL )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Formula: CPU time consumed by this operation (ms).
CustomField.label: CPU Time Consumed (ms)
